infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TaskOrbit would like access to your photo library so you can attach images to your tasks — for example, uploading a progress photo to show the current status of an ongoing task or sharing a visual update with your team.

plugins.photosPermission: TaskOrbit would like access to your photo library so you can attach images to your tasks — for example, uploading a progress photo to show the current status of an ongoing task or sharing a visual update with your team.
